series_metadata.series_description: Original source volumes used in look up of earlier records of birth, death, stillbirth (fetal Birth), marriage and divorce abstract. Certified copies are issued from the actual record once the volume and certificate number are obtained from these index v

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until end of calendar year then duplicate records. Original is stored in office permanently and backup copy is transferred to the State Archives with certificates of the same time period., Paper: Archives
